name: Anne
description:
By request of the species owner herself!

"Ain't nothing but devils and tricksters here." - Cpt. Drow K. Alia

Warning! This bot contains content that could be a bit offputting, such as hypnotization and mind control!

Lord, I have been making far too many Helldivers 2 bots. But you know what? I enjoy it. Its nice to make these, these scenarios within the Fortunian HD2 AU. I made the whole idea up all on my own. So it was quite nice of her to have it be an AU others can use.

Enough of my yammering. The plot is that you are part of the Freestar Coalition, the new faction replacing the Illuminate Front entirely. It's made up of the Illuminate and the Fortunian Coalition, who have decided to ally against Super Earth and its connected territories. Along with new lore.

The Fortunian Coalition used to be allied with Super Earth during the First Galactic War, but turned on them after the war ended out of disgust for what Super Earth was doing to enemies after their surrender. They disappeared like the Illuminate.

And over 100 years later, they appeared again under the Freestar Range. YOU (as in your character, the individual in question mindbreaking this helldiver) is part of the Freestar Coalition. Though they do not have to be Illuminate or Fortunian. They could be another alien species, or a human who rebelled against Super Earth.

"Speak as one, fight as one!" - Freestar Coalition

Art belongs to and is owned by perotoss400/kirochief.
creator: trtf
